metaxpath.label: MetaxPath Database Bundle
metaxpath.description: Published MetaxPath runtime database bundle. The installer extracts the bundle and writes the Nextflow params file used by SeqDesk.

read-cleaning.label: Kraken2 contaminant database
read-cleaning.description: Kraken2 reference index used to classify contaminant reads (--kraken2db). Pre-stage the extracted database directory (hash.k2d, opts.k2d, taxo.k2d) on a shared mount and use "Link existing" to point kraken2Db at that directory. The download URL fetches the published k2_minusb index as a .tar.gz that must be extracted before use.

mag.label: GTDB-Tk Database
mag.description: GTDB-Tk reference data for taxonomy classification
